description: Wait for architect signal, implement backend API spec, update status board, signal architect on completion

steps.content:
## Backend API Implementation Spec
Written by backend-dev.

Endpoints:
  GET    /api/v1/users          — list all users (paginated)
  POST   /api/v1/users          — create user { name, role }
  GET    /api/v1/users/:id      — get user by ID
  GET    /api/v1/tasks          — list tasks (filter by assignee/status)
  POST   /api/v1/tasks          — create task { title, assignee }
  PATCH  /api/v1/tasks/:id      — update task status
  WS     /api/v1/ws             — real-time task updates

Data Layer:
  PostgreSQL for persistence, Redis for caching hot queries.
  Connection pool: 20 connections, 5s timeout.

Auth:
  JWT tokens, RS256 signing, 1h expiry.
  Role-based access: admin can CRUD all, user can CRUD own tasks.

Testing:
  100% endpoint coverage, integration tests with test DB.
